changes: Thaumometer entity scan target is locked by UUID at use start and no longer retargets at finishUsingItem.
Thaumometer release/cancel before full TC4 hold duration clears pending block/entity scan targets.
Infusion component pedestal consumption preserves container remainders and drops them if the pedestal slot is still occupied.
Infusion terminal failure telemetry survives clearCraftingState and records travelling component/source/snapshot NBT.
Research/Thaumonomicon visibility uses central TC4 flag policy and avoids opening synthetic blank pages for entries without original page payload.
Greatwood/Silverwood vegetation generation was removed from the player-area tick fallback to prevent visible tree pop-in while walking.
Greatwood/Silverwood vegetation now runs through the Forge new-chunk load/worldgen entrypoint only, preserving TC4 IWorldGenerator-style lifecycle.
